_fixtureMetadata.source: Synthetic Intigriti-shaped program (no real company data)
_fixtureMetadata.note: Fictional 'Example Corp' on RFC 2606 reserved domains (example.com/.net/.org). Retains only parser-relevant public program fields; no researcher activity, user identifiers, real asset identifiers, or platform metadata.

description: Example Corp is a fictional location-platform company used only to exercise the Intigriti program parser. Any resemblance to a real program is coincidental.
name: Example Corp

content.description:
#### Our promise to you
We aim to respond to every report within a few business days and keep you updated.

#### Your promise to us
* All reports should be written in English.
* Provide detailed but to-the-point reproduction steps.
* Please do not use automatic scanners; test manually.

#### Our promise to you
We aim to respond to every report within a few business days and keep you updated.

#### Your promise to us
* All reports should be written in English.
* Provide detailed but to-the-point reproduction steps.
* Please do not use automatic scanners; test manually.

content.content:
We are happy to announce our bug bounty program!

#### Application

**Key objectives**:
* Authentication bypass
* Authorization bypass
* Infrastructure access

We are particularly interested, but not limited to, in:
* Horizontal or vertical privilege escalation
* XSS (no self-XSS)
* RCE
* Injection (SQL/NoSQL/LDAP)
* Broken authentication
* Sensitive data exposure
* XXE
* Broken Access Control
* Insecure Deserialization

#### Mobile
* SSO implementation
* Exposed data (shared libraries, exported components)
* Issues with deep links
* Information disclosure through APIs

#### Employee user accounts
* Active employee accounts within the domain @example.com for any service in domains *.example.com (excluding unverified accounts on account.example.com) and sso.example.org.

#### Application

* API key disclosure without proven business impact
* Self-XSS that cannot be used to exploit other users
* Missing security headers
* Missing cookie flags
* Clickjacking without proven impact
* Username/email enumeration
* Bypassing rate-limits or the non-existence of rate-limits
* HTTP Request smuggling without any proven impact
* Blind SSRF without proven business impact

#### The following tests are prohibited
* **Brute Force / Automated Scans**
	- It is prohibited to perform automated scans / brute force attempts.
	- It is prohibited to perform more than 10 requests per second.
* **Denial of Service**
	- Denial of Service
	- Distributed Denial of Service
	- Any similar high load testing

#### Out of scope domains
* Any domain that is not listed in the Domains section is out of scope for this program.
